All being so, he will eke out his food by begging, be devoid of everything and will wear torn robes,
or will wander without clothes.
42-45. EFFECTS OF MORE PLANETS IN INIMICAL CAMPS.
If there are two planets, that are placed in inimical sings one will be miserable and ever fond of
quarrels and be subjected to humiliation.
With three such planets he will be tormented by many expenses and miseries and will lose wealth
in spite of hard labour.
With four being so placed, he will be at a loss in regard to his near and dear and wealth.
Five heavenly bodies in such a state indicate, that the native will be troubled by many evils.
With six planets in inimical camps, he will be very miserable.
If seven planets are in their inimical Signs, the native belongs to a loathsome family and will be
devoid of food, robes, beds etc.
Thus ends the 45th Ch. entitled EFFECTS OF PLANETARY DIGNITIES in Kalyana Varmas
SARAVALI.
Chapter 46.
Female Horoscopy
l.
